info.name: PipPip API
info.description: Complete API for PipPip platform — Authentication, Service Booking & Dispatch, Admin management. Tokens set as collection variables after login.

body.raw:
{
    "service_category_id": "{{service_category_id}}",
    "customer_lat": 36.1901,
    "customer_lng": 44.0089,
    "customer_address": "123 Test Street, Erbil, Iraq",
    "customer_notes": "Please call when you arrive",
    "booking_type": "immediate",
    "payment_method": "cash"
}

item.name: Admin Bookings
item.description: Requires admin web session. Login via Admin Auth > Login (Web) first; Postman cookie jar carries the session.
